title: Junior Business Development Manager at PropEquity

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at PropEquity
jsonLd.description:
PropEquity, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PropEquity:
PropEquity is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropEquity!
